entities.name: Fighter
entities.canonicalText: Fighter — Hit Die: d10. STR/CON saves. Heavy armor and martial weapons. ...

entries: A master of martial combat, skilled with a variety of weapons and armor.

entities.name: Battle Master
entities.canonicalText: Those who emulate the archetypal Battle Master employ martial techniques passed down through generations.

entries: Those who emulate the archetypal Battle Master employ martial techniques passed down through generations.

entities.name: Bullywug
entities.canonicalText: Bullywug — Medium humanoid (bullywug), neutral evil. AC 15. HP 11 (2d8+2). ...

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The bullywug can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Speak with Frogs and Toads
entries: The bullywug can communicate simple concepts to frogs and toads when it speaks in Bullywug.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The bullywug makes two melee attacks: one with its bite and one with its spear.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 3} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}{@damage 1d4+1} bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Spear
entries: {@atk mw,rw} {@hit 3} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}{@damage 1d6+1} piercing damage.

entities.name: Fireball
entities.canonicalText: Fireball — 3rd-level evocation. ...

components.m: a tiny ball of bat guano and sulfur

entries: A bright streak flashes from your pointing finger to a point you choose within range and then blossoms with a low roar into an explosion of flame. Each creature in a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on that point must make a Dexterity saving throw. A target takes {@damage 8d6} fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
The fire spreads around corners. It ignites flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.
entriesHigherLevel: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 4th level or higher, the damage increases by {@damage 1d6} for each slot level above 3rd.

entities.name: The Planes
entities.canonicalText: The planes of existence are the realms of the multiverse.

entries: The planes of existence are the realms of the multiverse, home to immortals and mortals alike.

entities.name: Encounter Building
entities.canonicalText: To build a balanced encounter, calculate the XP budget by party level and size.

entries: To build a balanced encounter, calculate the XP budget by party level and size, then select monsters whose XP totals fall within that budget.

entities.name: Human
entities.canonicalText: Humans are the most adaptable and ambitious people among the common races.

entries: Humans are the most adaptable and ambitious people among the common races.

entities.name: High Elf
entities.canonicalText: As a high elf, you have a keen mind and a mastery of at least the basics of magic.

entries: As a high elf, you have a keen mind and a mastery of at least the basics of magic.

entities.name: Acolyte
entities.canonicalText: You have spent your life in the service of a temple to a specific god or pantheon of gods.

entries: You have spent your life in the service of a temple to a specific god or pantheon of gods.

entries.name: Feature: Shelter of the Faithful
entries: As an acolyte, you command the respect of those who share your faith.

entities.name: Alert
entities.canonicalText: Always on the lookout for danger, you gain the following benefits.

entries: Always on the lookout for danger, you gain the following benefits.

items: You gain a +5 bonus to initiative.
You can't be surprised while you are conscious.
Other creatures don't gain advantage on attack rolls against you as a result of being unseen by you.

entities.name: Longsword
entities.canonicalText: A longsword is a martial melee weapon dealing 1d8 slashing damage.

entries: Proficiency with a longsword allows you to add your proficiency bonus to the attack roll for any attack you make with it.

entities.name: Chain Mail
entities.canonicalText: Chain mail is heavy armor providing AC 16.

entries: Made of interlocking metal rings, chain mail includes a layer of quilted fabric worn underneath to prevent chafing.

entities.name: Backpack
entities.canonicalText: A backpack can hold one cubic foot or 30 pounds of gear.

entries: A backpack can hold one cubic foot or 30 pounds of gear.

entities.name: Cloak of Protection
entities.canonicalText: You gain a +1 bonus to AC and saving throws while you wear this cloak.

entries: You gain a +1 bonus to AC and saving throws while you wear this cloak.

entities.name: Pelor
entities.canonicalText: Pelor is the god of the sun and healing, revered throughout the world.

entries: Pelor is the god of the sun and healing, revered throughout the world.

entities.name: Pit Trap
entities.canonicalText: A pit trap consists of a hidden hole in the floor.

entries: A pit trap consists of a hidden hole in the floor covered by a trapdoor or illusion.

entities.name: Blinded
entities.canonicalText: A blinded creature can't see and automatically fails any ability check that requires sight.

items: A blinded creature can't see and automatically fails any ability check that requires sight.
Attack rolls against the creature have advantage, and the creature's attack rolls have disadvantage.

entities.name: Sewer Plague
entities.canonicalText: Sewer plague is a filth disease that incubates in sewers and refuse heaps.

entries: Sewer plague is a filth disease that incubates in sewers and refuse heaps.

entities.name: Warhorse
entities.canonicalText: A warhorse is bred for combat with a speed of 60 feet.

entries: A warhorse is bred for combat and can be ridden into battle.

entities.name: The Nine Hells of Baator
entities.canonicalText: The Nine Hells of Baator is a plane of absolute law and evil.

entries: The Nine Hells of Baator is a plane of absolute law and evil, ruled by archdevils who answer to Asmodeus.

entities.name: Candlekeep
entities.canonicalText: Candlekeep is a great library fortress on the Sword Coast.

entries: Candlekeep is a great library fortress on the Sword Coast, home to the greatest collection of books and scrolls in Faerûn.

entities.name: The Harpers
entities.canonicalText: The Harpers are a secret network of spellcasters and spies who oppose the rise of tyranny.

entries: The Harpers are a secret network of spellcasters and spies who oppose the rise of tyranny.
